case_title: DOROTHY MARTINEZ et al VS. MAIRE DWAN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

DEPT. 501: PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ AND RONNEY RENDON'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ADMISSIONS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $975. JUDGE: LILLIAN K. SING; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ AND RONNEY RENDON'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT MAIRE DWAN IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH JULY 14, 2014 ORDER. SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,625 TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. DEFENDANT'S ANSWER FILED ON MARCH 6, 2014 IS STRICKEN. DEFENDANT MAY REQUEST ENTRY OF DEFAULT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Michael Bracamontes, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Plaintiff represented to the court that the case has settled. Notice of Settlement on file. Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set for Jun-21-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Continued To Feb-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Dwans Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aisa Villarosa, Esq. (415-835-6777) of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/opposing party Dorothy Martinez.
Thomas Gelini, Esq. (510-444-7688) of Bennett, Samuelsen, Reynolds, Allard, Cowperthwaite & Gelini for Defendant/ moving party MAIRE DWAN.
Court reporter: Alesia Collins-Hudson, CSR #7751, (415-591-3333), Reported. (501).

The Court reads the tentative ruling. The Court concurred with opposing party that no new facts or law have been presented. The burden remains on the moving party. Defendant argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MAIRE DWAN's Motion For Reconsideration of Order Denying Defendant's motion to vacate Default is DENIED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Alesia Collins-Hudson, CSR #7751, (415-591-3333), Reported. (501).

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Continued To Nov-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Maire Dwans Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Tamra E Keen, CSR No. 5404, Tel. 415.591.3333. (D501)

Attorney, Michael Schreiber of Bracamontes & Vlasak (415.835.6777) for plaintiff/opposing party
Attorney, Thomas S. Gelini of Bennett Samueulsen Reynolds et al (510.444.7688) for defendant/moving party

Court hears arguments from both sides. Court adopts tentative ruling and rules now as follows:

DEFENDANT MAIRE DWAN's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-21-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Wilson, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasnik, (415-835-6777), for Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ and RONNEY RENDON's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Defendant Maire Dwan is GRANTED. Defendant failed to comply with July 14, 2014 order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,625 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel. Defendant's answer filed on March 6, 2014 is stricken. Defendant may request entry of default. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S Responses To Discovery, For An Order Establishing Admissions, And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Jessica C. Wilson, Esq. of Bracamontes & Vlasak Law Offices (415-835-6777), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
No appearance by defendant/opposing party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS DOROTHY MARTINEZ, MICHAEL CORTEZ and RONNEY RENDON'S Motion To Compel Defendant'S Responses To Discovery, For An Order Establishing Admissions, And Request For Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendant shall serve responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Demand for Production within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $975.
